title: X-tra Crisp Fried German Long-bean Fried-Rice
description: A twist on traditional fried rice, featuring German long-beans and kombu-cold-extract, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the canola oil in a comal or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped German long-beans and cook until tender, about 4 minutes.
Add the cooked rice to the comal or skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the dissolved kombu-cold-extract, soy sauce, salt, and pepper to the rice mixture.
Stir-fry the rice mixture for another 2-3 minutes, until the rice is coated in the liquid and starting to crisp.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter or individual plates.
Optional: garnish with chopped green onions or grated carrot for added color and freshness.
